features: Fast Charging via USB-C | Supports fast charging to get your devices powered up quickly, saving you time and keeping you on the goWith 3 USB-A ports and 1 USB-C port, you can power up to 4 devices at once, perfect for busy households or travel
Fast Charging via USB-C | Supports fast charging to get your devices powered up quickly, saving you time and keeping you on the go
PPS Technology | Ensures smart power delivery by adjusting voltage and current in real-time, optimising charging efficiency for all your devices
Compact & Portable Design | Sleek and lightweight, this charger is perfect for home, office, or travel use, easily fitting into bags or suitcases
Universal Compatibility | Works with a wide range of devices, from smartphones to tablets, offering a reliable and safe charging solution wherever you are
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | 35W 4-Port USB Charger with Fast Charging – 3 USB-A & 1 USB-C, Compact Multi-Device Charging Station with PPS Technology for Home, Office & Travel The Mercury 35W 4-Port USB Charger is a versatile and compact charging solution, designed to power up to four devices simultaneously. Featuring three USB Type-A ports and one fast-charge USB Type-C port, it's ideal for use at home, in the office, or while travelling. The charger supports fast charging via the USB-C port and is equipped with PPS (Programmable Power Supply) technology, which intelligently adjusts voltage and current in real time to provide optimal power based on your device's charging status. With a sleek, portable design, this 35W charger offers reliable performance, making it perfect for those who need a convenient and efficient way to charge multiple devices at once. Suitable for a wide range of devices, the Mercury charger ensures your gadgets are powered quickly and safely, wherever you are. PRODUCT FEATURES: Charge Multiple Devices Simultaneously | With 3 USB-A ports and 1 USB-C port, you can power up to 4 devices at once, perfect for busy households or travel Fast Charging via USB-C | Supports fast charging to get your devices powered up quickly, saving you time and keeping you on the go PPS Technology | Ensures smart power delivery by adjusting voltage and current in real-time, optimising charging efficiency for all your devices Compact & Portable Design | Sleek and lightweight, this charger is perfect for home, office, or travel use, easily fitting into bags or suitcases Universal Compatibility | Works with a wide range of devices, from smartphones to tablets, offering a reliable and safe charging solution wherever you are SPECIFICATION: Input: 110-240V 50/60Hz 1.0A Wattage: 35W USB Type A Output: USB-A1+USB-A2+USB-A3 Total Output: 5.0V - 3.0A 15.0W Max USB Type C Output: 5.0V - 3.0A 15.0W Max or USB Type C Output: 9.0V - 2.22A 20.0W Max or USB Type C Output: 12.0V - 1.67A 20.0W Max or USB Type C Output: PPS1:3.3-5.9V - 3.0A 17.7W Max or USB Type C Output: PPS2:3.3-11.0V - 1.8A 19.8W Max Total power output: USB-C+USB-A1+USB-A2+USB-A3 Total Output: 35.0W Max
